title: rubus caesius var. ligerinus
intro: Rubus caesius var. ligerinus, also known as the blue-black raspberry or wild raspberry, is a variety of the black raspberry species native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus caesius var. ligerinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
